content.en:
"Collect all these purple ruin gold liquids on the other side!"

This kind of work is naturally done by these other side level geniuses.

The purple ruin gold liquid on the other side is very heavy, and it is also troublesome to collect, you need to collect it little by little, and if you want to put it away with a wave of your hand, it can't be done, it is equivalent to competing with the power of the entire Zixu Lake on the other side, and it will definitely fail.

Thereupon.

This group of other shore level geniuses collected the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side little by little, and then handed it over to the Lord of Mystery and Mystery.

After it goes out, it will be distributed by the Lord of Mystery.

Time passed slowly, and all the gold liquid of the purple ruins on the other side was collected, and it was also kept by the Lord of Mystery.

The entire Zixu Lake on the other side was taken away, leaving nothing behind.

And they didn't know about the existence of the purple-gold crystal, so they didn't care.

Then they left.

......

Coming out of the Purple Mist Domain on the other side.

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard proposed, "Lord of Mystery, should we go out first and send the resources away?" It would be a shame if we continued to explore and really fell here!"

The Lord of Mystic thought about it and felt that it made sense.

They can explore this treasure slowly and there is no need to explore it all in one sitting.

"Good!"

The Lord of the Mystic agreed.

Subsequently.

So they went back and prepared to go out first.

And Ye Tian also went out.

In a short time, they were outside this treasure land.

The Lord of Xuan Miao informed the people of the Xiao family and mentioned the matter of Zixu Lake on the other side.

Suddenly, the matter of Zixu Lake on the other side was exposed.

Immediately after, the Lord of Mystery began to allocate resources, which was also something that the Lord of the Dragon Lizard was looking forward to.

They want to come out first, just to allocate resources and then put resources outside.

In this way, even if it is really unlucky to fall, the resources will be saved.

Otherwise, they will all fall, and the resources will not be brought out!

......

Rumble!!!

An Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor with an incomparably terrifying aura appeared.

The arrival of this Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor shocked Ye Tian and other other shore-level geniuses.

"The aura of this Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor is even more terrifying than that of the Lord of Ice and Rain!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Lord of Ice and Rain is the most powerful Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor on Wind Tooth Island, and this Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor is most likely the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

"Ancestor!"

The Lord of Mystery shouted excitedly.

"I've seen the Lord of the Bloody Night!"

Ye Tian and other other shore-level geniuses said respectfully.

"Miaoman girl, I heard that you found the Zixu Lake on the other side?"

The Lord of the Blood Night smiled.

"Yes!" replied the Lord of Mystery.

"Have you found the Purple Ruins Crystal on the other side?" asked the Lord of the Blood Night.

"What is the purple ruin crystal on the other side?" the Lord of Mystery wondered.

The Lord of the Bloody Night said, "It is a crystalline substance bred by the Purple Ruin Lake on the other side, and its value far exceeds the Purple Ruin Gold Liquid on the other side. Such a large Zixu Lake on the other side must have given birth to this kind of treasure. "

"Nope!"

The Lord of the Mysteries.

"No?" the Lord of the Bloody Night frowned.

He didn't believe it, it stands to reason that it must have been bred!

"Tell me the whole process of obtaining the Purple Ruins Gold Liquid on the other side!"

The Lord of the Bloody Night.

The Lord of the Mystic could only say it truthfully, and when the Lord of the Mystic said that they had encountered a group of Purple Ruin Worms, he was not surprised, because this was an inevitable process.

And when he learned that Ye Tian had killed all the Purple Ruin Worms alone, he also recognized Ye Tian's strength very much.

But.

Wow!

The Lord of the Blood Night came to Ye Tian's face.

"Lord of Endless, you are the first genius to enter the Purple Ruin Lake on the other side, if you kill all the Purple Ruin Worms, if you take the Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side, no one will find out. "Lord of the Bloody Night.

As soon as these words came out, Ye Tian pretended to be angry: "Lord of the Blood Night, what do you mean by this? Although you are from the Origin Upper Realm, I have also saved the Lord of Mystic again and again, if it weren't for me, they would all have fallen." As a result, I have paid so much, but you suspect that I have taken some of the purple ruin crystals from the other side!"

"Ancestor ......"

The Lord of Mystery also wanted to say something, but was interrupted by the Lord of the Blood Night.

"Miao Man, don't interfere. The value of the purple ruin crystal on the other side is too high, if he really took it, our Xiao family must take it back. If he hadn't taken it, I'd have made amends. After the Lord of the Blood Night finished speaking, he looked at Ye Tiandao again: "Lord of Endless, I need to use a secret treasure to probe the void in your body, if you really hide the purple ruin crystal on the other side, you will definitely not be able to hide it." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded very dryly, without a trace of hesitation.

This crisp appearance stunned the Lord of the Blood Night.

"Could it be that this Endless Lord really didn't take it? Impossible, every Purple Ruin Lake on the other side will give birth to the Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side, unless the Endless Lord firmly believes in his means to hide the Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side, or he lost it somewhere in this treasure land. But he didn't know in advance that I would come, so he shouldn't have left the Purple Ruins Crystal on the other side inside the treasure land. "

Seeing that things have developed to this point, the Lord of the Blood Night will naturally continue to investigate.

He took out a mirror, and it was a very high-level Origin Rule weapon.

Airplanes!

This mirror shone on Ye Tian's body, and in an instant, every particle in his body was pierced, and it couldn't be hidden anywhere, and any treasures were illuminated one by one.

Little by little, time passed.

The Lord of the Blood Night gradually frowned, because he had not yet found the Purple Ruins Crystal on the other side.

After a long time.

The Lord of the Blood Night finally put away the mirror and said helplessly: "Endless Lord, I misunderstood you, I'm sorry. Miao Man, you can give him some more purple ruin gold liquid from the other side as compensation!"

After speaking.

The Lord of the Blood Night left directly, and he was embarrassed to stay here.

Then.

The Lord of Mystic apologized, "Lord of Endless, I'm sorry, I didn't know that my ancestor would suddenly be like this. "

"It's fine!"

Ye Tian waved his hand.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Xuan Miao took out some of the purple ruin gold liquid from the other side and gave it to Ye Tian, and Ye Tian gladly accepted it.

Next, they need to take a break before entering the treasure land to explore again.

......

"This time it's too dangerous, but fortunately, I put those purple ruin gold liquid and purple ruin crystals on the other side in another replica body, and that replica body has been hidden in the treasure land and has not come out. Otherwise, it will definitely be discovered this time!"

Ye Tian said happily.

He was also very curious about what kind of treasure the purple ruin crystal on the other side was able to make the existence of the Origin Upper Realm feel moved and come over in person.

The value of this thing must be incomparable!

"After returning to Stormtooth Island, take the opportunity to ask the Lord of Ice Rain, the Lord of Ice Rain should know. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

The other other shore-level geniuses were ready to go back and send the resources back.

And he didn't go back, he continued to stay here.

After some time, one by one, the other side level geniuses returned.

Only then did the Lord of Mystery bring many other geniuses to enter this treasure land again to explore other places. ~
